summary: Soundboard recording of a rocking set with logical track divisions
review: Both reviewers praise the performance as a "really rockin'" second set and note that the way the tracks are divided makes sense, though one wishes several songs be combined into single files. No audio flaws are mentioned, indicating a clean soundboard source.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews are high (4‑5 stars) and focus on the strong performance; no recording problems are reported, yielding a solid combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No sound issues noted; reviewers only discuss track segmentation preferences.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Set is described as rocking and the division of tracks is considered appropriate by listeners.
